MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVIAR, BASILIO ALVIAR, JENE RITA SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-22-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-29-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

2:00PM DEPT 8, JUDGE BARRY WILLDORF. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLTFS PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL. DEFT RENE ALLEGRE PRESENT, ANA ALLEGRE & JULIA ALLEGRE FAILING TO APPEAR. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGRE, ANA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLEGRE, RENE ALLEGRE, ANA ALLEGRE, JULIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2539 BRYANT STREET $1,350.00 RENT, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, DISMISSAL TO BE FILED IF DEFT VACATES BY 7/15/94. IF THE DEFT DOES NOT MOVE BY 7/15/94 THE JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED AS NOTED, MUTUAL RELEASE, NO OTHER W/RIGHT TO POSSESS, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVIAR, BASILIO ALVIAR, JENE RITA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLEGRE, RENE ALLEGRE, ANA ALLEGRE, JULIA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
